description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
An unoccupied Zoox autonomous vehicle was traveling east on Hill Street toward Valencia Street in San Francisco when an SUV (Vehicle 
2) that had been stationary while in an apparent attempt to parallel park along the right curb suddenly pulled out into the path of the 
approaching Zoox vehicle. The Zoox vehicle braked hard and attempted to steer left, but the right front wheel and body panel of the Zoox 
vehicle made contact with the left front wheel and panel of Vehicle 2. The Zoox vehicle was towed from the scene for inspection and was 
found to have sustained minor damage. There were no reported injuries, and police were not notified
Print
Clear Form
